Class Assignment3

java.lang.Object
  |
  +--Assignment3
public class Assignment3
extends java.lang.Object

Assignment3 object has only one method which takes an array of Objects, and returns that array sorted (Objects must implement the Comparable interface, or a ObjectIsNotComparableException will be thrown.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
Jamie's Page

sort

public static java.lang.Object[] sort(java.lang.Object[] initial_list)
                               throws ObjectIsNotComparableException

Parameters:
initial_list, - a list of Comparable Objects
Returns:
a list of sorted Comparable Objects
